entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan L. Millsp., a legume susceptible to pod borer damage

entities.name: POD BORER
entities.description: An insect pest that damages pigeonpea pods, identified as Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or defend against pod borer damage

entities.name: CAJANUS SPECIES
entities.description: A genus of plants including pigeonpea and its wild relatives

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The use of genetic traits in plants to minimize pest losses and reduce pesticide use

entities.name: DEFENCE GENES
entities.description: Genes from wild relatives used to introgress resistance into pigeonpea

entities.name: WIDE HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A breeding technique used to transfer genes from distant relatives to a crop

entities.name: C. LANCEOLATUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea used in hybridization for resistance

entities.name: C. CAJANIFOLIUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea used in hybridization for resistance

entities.name: C. VOLUBILIS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea used in hybridization for resistance

entities.name: C. PLATYCARPUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea used in hybridization for resistance

entities.name: UNPROTECTED FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environment where plants were screened for pod borer resistance without pesticide protection

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU
entities.description: The research site in India where the screening was conducted

entities.name: PROTEASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Defence proteins that inhibit the activity of gut proteases in insects

entities.name: H. ARMIGERA
entities.description: The scientific name for the pod borer insect

entities.name: GELATIN-PAGE
entities.description: An electrophoresis technique used to visualize protease inhibitor profiles

entities.name: HGPI
entities.description: Helicoverpa gut protease inhibitor units measuring the activity against insect proteases

entities.name: HPTI
entities.description: Human pancreatic trypsin inhibitor activity levels used to assess human safety
